project_name: Fırat Optik - Luxury Eyewear E-commerce & Showcase

headings.usage: Hero texts, brand names, editorial quotes, section headers. Gives the Vogue/Harper's Bazaar luxury aesthetic.

body.usage: Technical specs, admin panel, small UI elements, buttons. High legibility and modern contrast.

strict_rules: NO dark backgrounds anywhere EXCEPT the initial loading screen.
NO gradients under any circumstances. Stick to pure solid colors.
Strict monochrome palette. Any color comes only from product images on hover.
Use #050505 instead of pure #000000 for slightly better optical softness.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E5E5 for separation, creating a structured, magazine-layout feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: None. Flat, editorial design. Rely on space and scale for hierarchy.
hover_effects: Images: Start grayscale (grayscale), transition to full color on hover (hover:grayscale-0) with a slow duration (duration-700).
Brand blocks: Slight image scale up (hover:scale-105) inside an overflow-hidden container.
visual_enhancers.padding: Generous spacing. Use p-12, p-24, p-32 to create luxury negative space.

grids_and_layouts.general: Asymmetrical, editorial layouts. Avoid standard rigid bootstrap columns.
grids_and_layouts.brand_showcase: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid. Mix of large span images (col-span-8) and smaller supporting images (col-span-4).
grids_and_layouts.technical_section: 50/50 split with massive typography on one side, close-up lens photography on the other.

motion.scrolling: Smooth scroll using Lenis is MANDATORY.
motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for the infinite brand logo strip. Very slow speed, monochrome, gap-32.
motion.entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-ups for text and images.
motion.loading: Full screen black (#050505) with white 'FIRAT OPTİK' text logo. Fades out after 2 seconds to reveal the white site.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure black text on pure white background for maximum APCA contrast.
accessibility.focus: Use focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:outline-none for all interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

media.treatment: Images should feel editorial. Default state is B&W. Use object-cover and aspect ratios like 3:4, 4:5, or 16:9 depending on the block.

hero.description: Woman in black suit and sunglasses - high fashion
Portrait of stylish woman in fur coat and sunglasses

editorial_brands.description: Woman in sunglasses and fur jacket sits in chair
Black framed eyeglasses on white surface
Woman elegantly displays a pair of stylish eyeglasses
Portrait of a stylish woman wearing glasses

technical.description: Close-up of a camera lens with reflection, showing intricate design
Close up of a precision optical lens

hero_texts: Cam kalitesinde standart değil, seviye sunuyoruz

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-stack application with React frontend and FastAPI backend.
Implement an admin panel (CRUD) to manage brands and add/edit/delete products using image URLs.
The site MUST use a black-and-white minimalist concept (Vogue/Harper's Bazaar style). NO dark mode (except the loading screen).
Hero slider must display the 3 exact Turkish phrases.
Create a bottom section focusing on 'Technical Excellence' (cam kalitesi) using the technical lens images.
Include a 'Randevu Al' (Book Appointment) section with phone and WhatsApp links in the footer.
Hovering over editorial brand blocks or images should transition them from B&W to color smoothly.
Brand pages should display a product gallery fetched from the backend.
Use standard JS files (.jsx/.js) for React components, no TypeScript (.tsx).
Use Tailwind for styling. Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical alignments.
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or surfaces with content under it. Apply backdrop blur and semi-transparent white.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx
